title: space_set silently drops name/description on wrong JSON type
description: Trigger: Space/set update {"name": 42} → Phase 1 skips it (is_simple_space_prop returns true, skips validation), Phase 2 calls value.as_str() which returns None, new_name stays None, update_space_fully writes nothing, returns Ok(true) → response shows space_id in updated[]. Client has no way to know the write was silently dropped. RFC 8620 §5.3 requires notUpdated with invalidProperties. Same issue for description. No test covers wrong-type simple props.
